name: Chocolate Mallow Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients (except marshmallows) in a mixing bowl.
2. Blend at the lowest speed, then beat at medium speed for 2 minutes.
3. Spread batter into a 10 x 6 inch baking dish.
4. Microwave at 50% (Medium) power for 6 minutes. Rotate the dish 1/4 turn every 3 minutes.
5. Increase power to high and microwave an additional 2-5 minutes until done.
6. Let stand on countertop, uncovered, for 5-10 minutes.
7. Place marshmallows cut side down and close together on top of the cake after it has stood for 3-4 minutes.
8. Cool completely before frosting with Chocolate Frosting.
9. Frost tops of 2 layers or 24 cupcakes.
-----FROSTING-----
1 ounce Unsweetened chocolate, chopped
2 tablespoons Butter or margarine
3 tablespoons Milk
2 cups Confectioners' sugar
1/2 teaspoon Vanilla extract
1/8 teaspoon Salt
1. In a small mixing bowl, combine chocolate, butter, and milk.
2. Microwave at 50% (Medium) power for 3-4 minutes, stirring after half the time.
3. Continue microwaving until the chocolate is soft and the mixture is thick, stirring again after half the time.
4. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
5. Let stand for 5-10 minutes.
6. Beat until smooth and of spreading consistency, about 1-3 minutes.
